use serde::Deserialize;
use std::fs;

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Manifest {
    package: Package,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct Package {
    name: String,
    version: String,
}

fn parse_manifest(path: &str) -> Result<Manifest, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let manifest: Manifest = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(manifest)
}

fn load_cargo_toml(path: &str) -> Result<toml::Value, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let value: tol::Value = toml::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(value)
}

fn read_and_parse_toml(path: &str) -> Result<Manifest, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let content = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let manifest: Manifest = toml::from_str(&content)?;
    Ok(manifest)
}
